case_title: MELTZER, JAMIE A. VS THE UNION GROUP, CA BUSINESS OF UNKNOWN ENTITY et al

docket_entries.description: BERT'S GABRIEL MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT HEARD ON 10/8/02 IS STRICKEN. THE COURT'S RECORD & REGISTER OF ACTION ARE CORRECTED TO INDICATE THAT BURT
PER STIPULATION OF PLFT AND DEFT TO SET ASIDE JUDGMENT AND DISMISS ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. STIP ORDER SIGNED BY COMM. KAPLAN.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MELTZER, JAMIE A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GABRIEL, BERT $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,080.00, JUDGMENT IS IN FAVOR OF DEFENDANT, THE UNION GROUP STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
PER ORDER OF JUDGE QUIDACHAY ACTION ENTERED ON 01/03/03 IS HEREBY SET ASIDE. THE ENTIRE ACTION IS HEREBY DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. ORDER SIGNED 2/3/
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT GABRIEL, BERT HEARING SET FOR OCT-08-2002 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
EXHIBITS ORDERED DESTROYED FEB. 9, 2006.

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUN-18-2002, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JUL-23-2002 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 FOR PLAINTIFF TO SERVE DEFENDANT GABRIEL AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE. DEFENDANT UNION GROUP WAIVES SERVICE OF PROCESS.
GABRIEL APPEARD AT TRIAL ON 8/16/02. BERT GABRIELS TIME TO APPEAL THE JUDGMENT ENTERED ON 8/19/02 BEGINS TO RUN ON THE DATE THIS ORDER IS MAILED.
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
EXHIBITS ORDERED DESTROYED

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY MELTZER, JAMIE A. AS TO DEFENDANT THE UNION GROUP, CA BUSINESS OF UNKNOWN ENTITY GABRIEL, BERT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-18-2002 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT GABRIEL, BERT
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUL-23-2002, CONTINUED BY COURT TO AUG-16-2002 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 NO TIME - WAIVER BY DEFENDANT, GABRIEL.
RECORD REMANDED TO SMALL CLAIMS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT THE UNION GROUP, CA BUSINESS OF UNKNOWN ENTITY STIPULATION TO SET ASIDE JUDGMENT AND DISMISS ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE, AND ORDER. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
TRIAL RESET TO JAN-22-2003 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF AUG-16-2002 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF OCT-08-2002, OFF CALENDAR
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY DEFENDANT THE UNION GROUP, CA BUSINESS OF UNKNOWN ENTITY GABRIEL, BERT

CASE (RESET) INORDER TO RENDER STIP DISMISSAL.
